summary: Frontend-only testing of the mobile-first wedding invitation. All 14 requested feature checkpoints passed on 414x896 (iPhone) and 360x800 (Android) viewports. Envelope opens via both tap-the-seal and drag-the-flap (>100px upward) interactions. All sections render with correct data-testids, content matches the wedding config, countdown ticks every second, scratch fallback button reveals 21 / AUG / 2026 and 10:00 AM - 10:15 AM, venue map link points to the configured Google Maps short URL, WhatsApp share href starts with https://wa.me/?text= , Copy-link shows 'Link copied' confirmation, BGM button toggles aria-label between Play and Pause states, scroll indicator present, OG meta tags present in index.html. Zero console/page errors during the full flow.
critical_code_review_comments: BGMPlayer.play() is invoked in a useEffect on autoStart without user gesture; Chrome/Safari will reject autoplay and trigger the 'Tap to play music' hint - acceptable but worth noting on real devices.
ScratchDate.checkRevealProgress() only fires on pointer-up; very fast scratchers reaching threshold mid-stroke will only reveal after lifting - minor UX nit.
WeddingInvite uses AnimatePresence around letter-content but opened is one-way (no close), so AnimatePresence is effectively unused - cosmetic cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React app at https://temple-love-story-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Envelope must be opened (tap [data-testid=envelope-open] OR drag [data-testid=envelope-flap] upward >100px) before letter-content renders. Scratch canvas is hard to simulate via Playwright - use the 'or tap here to reveal' fallback button. Use 414x896 viewport for primary tests. All 21 data-testids defined in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/wedding.js. Wedding data in /app/frontend/src/config/wedding.js.
verified_checkpoints: envelope-cover visible with 'A sacred invitation' and 'to our wedding' headers and A&S wax seal
dragging envelope-flap up >100px also opens the envelope
couple-section shows Aswathy, Sanjay, Aswathy Sreekumar, Sanjay Suresh with & between
message-section shows 'Mangalyam' script and 'മംഗല്യം' Malayalam mantra
scratch-card has scratch-canvas overlay and 'or tap here to reveal' fallback that reveals 21/AUG/2026 and 10:00 AM - 10:15 AM
countdown-timer with countdown-days/hours/minutes/seconds, values are non-negative ints and seconds tick down every second
venue-section shows 'Kunnathoor Devi Temple', 'Kuttamperoor', date, '10:00 AM - 10:15 AM' and map-button href = https://maps.app.goo.gl/oacr9vV8mYDg7scZ6?g_st=aw
bgm-toggle visible bottom-right, aria-label toggles between 'Play background music' and 'Pause background music' on click
share-whatsapp href starts with https://wa.me/?text= and is URL-encoded properly
share-copy button shows 'Link copied' after click
scroll-indicator present at top of page
Responsive on 360x800 with no horizontal overflow
Zero console errors / page errors during full flow
index.html contains og:title, og:description, og:image and twitter:card meta tags
